# SEO Content Opportunity Finder (Uplizd) - Automated keyword gap analysis and content strategy

## Summary
The SEO Content Opportunity Finder is an intelligent Uplizd workflow that automates the discovery of high-value content gaps by analyzing search trends and competitor data. By leveraging real-time data from BrightData and search engines, this solution empowers marketing teams to identify untapped keyword opportunities, optimize their editorial calendar, and improve organic search visibility with minimal manual research.
